steps.t: Locate the red book 'A History of Zajâna' in the south wing of the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Locate the red book 'A History of Zajâna' in the south wing of the Kalmakhíla in Zajâna.
Flee from the Tarsâri and return to Rayíka just outside the Kalmakhíla.
Read the note in the mysterious book in the Kalmakhíla.
Find a man dressed in yellow in the Court of Larinâsta in Zajâna.
